refactorPlan.title: Align reference_latent with the 'wraps ReferenceLatent' contract
refactorPlan.description: Add _get_reference_latent_type() lazy-import helper and _unwrap_node_output() helper. Rewrite reference_latent() to call ReferenceLatent.execute(conditioning, latent) from comfy_extras.nodes_edit_model and unwrap the result — matching the established lazy-import pattern used by every other wrapper in the codebase.

refactorPlan.title: Document LatentCut vs LatentCutToBatch divergence in qwen/layered.py
refactorPlan.description: Add a .. note:: block to the module docstring explaining that LatentCut(dim='t') is used in place of the reference workflow's LatentCutToBatch and why it is functionally equivalent.
